title: Pop Secret Diary for Girls with Invisible Pen, 7.5x5.4 Inch 160 Pages Heart Fidget Girls Diary with Lock & Invisible Ink Double-end Pen Kids Notebook Gifts for Girls Birthday Presents 5-12 Year Old
features: 【 GIFT FOR GIRLS】- Diary with Lock and Heart Pop Fidget, comes with 1 Double-end Invisible Ink Pen – Blue Ink Ballpoint Pen. The kids notebook set is perfect girls gifts for age 6-12, to encourage them to explore creativity writing, and keep their secret memory

【SECRET DIARY FOR GIRLS】 - It’s 7.5x5.4 inches(19x13.8cm) perfect size for kids diary with lock and keys. A funny pop fidget kids toys on the cute GRL-PWR hardcover, it makes a soft popping sound when pushed in and popped out the bubbles, this journal for girls is fun and stress relief,every girl deserves this cute stuff

【GIRL JOURNALS LINED PAGES】 - This notebooks for kids is 160 pages with lined (80 sheets), in thick white paper. Using the double-end invisible magic pen and ballpoint pen, kids can write their diary and keep their secret from peeking eyes

【SAFE INVISIBLE INK PEN】- It is a very magic and funny invisible ink pen with double end! Kids loves to hide their messages on the notebooks with invisible pen, their secret only shown when shinning with the magic light on top. They also can write the daily diary with the blue ink ballpoint too. This invisible pen ink is washable and harmless

【STURDY BINDING NOTEBOOK】- Sturdy hardcover and sewn binding of the girls notebook, lightweight and easy to carry in kids backpack. It can be opened flat for both pages, comfortable to writing, drawing and coloring
description: Product Description GINMLYDA Pop Girls Diary with Lock and Invisible Ink Double-end Pen This invisible pen ink is washable and harmless! When kids pushed in and popped out the bubbles, it makes a soft popping sound! AMAZING GIFTS FOR GIRLS!
